startOver.title: Start Over?
startOver.description: This will reset your workflow progress and clear imported skills. Your API keys and settings will be kept.

welcome.title: Welcome to Proficiency Studio
welcome.subtitle: AI-Powered Skills Assessment
welcome.description: Proficiency Studio helps you assess employee skills using AI. Connect your data source, extract skills, and run a proficiency assessment in minutes.

aiPowered.title: AI-Powered Assessment
aiPowered.description: Leverage state-of-the-art LLMs to assess proficiency levels with high accuracy

multiSource.title: Multiple Data Sources
multiSource.description: Import from CSV files, SFTP servers, or connect directly to Eightfold API

exportReady.title: Export Ready
exportReady.description: Export results to CSV or directly to Eightfold for immediate use

integration.title: Choose Integration Path
integration.subtitle: Select how you want to import your skills data

csv.title: CSV Upload
csv.description: Upload a CSV file with your skills data

sftp.title: SFTP Server
sftp.description: Connect to an SFTP server to fetch employee data

api.title: API Connection
api.description: Connect to Eightfold API to fetch roles

integration.noSource: No data source detected. Go back to Step 1 to choose an integration type.

extractSkills.title: Extract Skills
extractSkills.subtitle: Extract unique skills from your selected data source
extractSkills.emptySource: No data source detected. Go back to Step 1 to choose an integration type.
extractSkills.errorRetry: Correct the issue above and try again.

configure.title: Configure Proficiency Assessment
configure.subtitle: Set up proficiency levels, choose your LLM provider, and customize assessment prompts

review.title: Review & Export
review.noResultsHint: Run an assessment in the previous step to see results here.

errors.noApiKey: Please configure an API key first
errors.noIntegration: No data source selected. Please go back to Step 1.
errors.loadFailed: Failed to load data. Please try again.
